title: VS Code ↔ pckg, docs, smooth editor DX
description:
beskid_vscode integrates pckg registry browsing, platform-spec and book navigation, LSP from cli-latest releases, and status-bar feedback for long-running toolchain operations.

## Provenance
- **Catalog cutoff:** [`aaddd32`](https://github.com/Cyber-Nomad-Collective/beskid/commit/aaddd32) → [`ee88edf`](https://github.com/Cyber-Nomad-Collective/beskid/commit/ee88edf) on **beskid** (2026-05-26 – 2026-06-07)
- **Anchor commit:** [`aaddd32`](https://github.com/Cyber-Nomad-Collective/beskid/commit/aaddd32)

## Catalog scope
- **Delivery version:** v0.4 (Platform services, auth, and delivery tooling)
- **Status:** Mostly done — `vscode-pckg-docs-integration` and `vscode-lsp-status-bar-dx` tasks Done; `beskid.docs.specBaseUrl`, platform-spec deep links, registry API docs, status-bar pckg health, and extension unit tests landed. Deferred: diagnostic → spec anchor links (LSP `publishDiagnostics`) and Open VSX publish smoke.
- **Workstreams:** `vscode-editor`
